rationale.org-governance: Hybrid maturity model assesses organization-wide security processes, practices, and improvement priorities.
rationale.ai-code-insecurity: Original survey-validated taxonomy ranks vulnerabilities in AI-generated code.
rationale.quality-debt: Empirically ranks code-quality and logic-error risks and mitigation maturity.
rationale.ai-review: Framework evaluates AI-based vulnerability prediction and automated code-review practices.
rationale.rules-based-checks: Framework evaluates static analysis, testing, fuzzing, and penetration-testing practices.
rationale.survey-input: Practitioner survey yields substantive risk priorities and mitigation-practice findings.
rationale.framework: Reusable four-level ANN-ISM security maturity design spans code-generation lifecycle.
rationale.built-system: ANN implemented in TensorFlow and hybrid model applied through organizational checklist.
rationale.expert-validated: Faculty pilot reviewed model structure after documented expert-panel development.
rationale.steering: Mitigation portfolio substantively includes prompt, template, fine-tuning, and input controls.
rationale.metrics: Defines security risk-importance and organizational mitigation-maturity scores.
rationale.risk-security: Reports security-risk taxonomy, rankings, predictions, and organizational mitigation results.
rationale.risk-quality: Reports code-quality risk rankings and evaluates quality-control practices.
rationale.risk-overreliance: Measures over-reliance risk and evaluates company HITL and XAI maturity.
rationale.method-self-report: Questionnaire, expert judgments, and company assessments produce primary evidence.
rationale.method-field-study: Case study evaluates framework within a real AI-code-generation company.
